params.effect: the action continues as if unblocked

effects.text: if this vampire was blocked while performing a non-bleed non-political action, the action continues as if unblocked.
Strike: combat ends. After combat ends, if this vampire was blocked while performing a non-bleed non-political action, the action continues as if unblocked.
